version_description: Other versions only have capo, and lack obvious voicings demonstrated in the recording.

versions.version_description: Because from what I've seen on Youtube the chords already on the site are wrong, and I've tried some of the chords on the site and it doesnt sound right
The other one aren't 100% correct. I learned the song watching Sam Hunt play it acoustic and transposed that onto the recording of the song and it's spot on..

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Song from the album "Back From the Edge".

recommended.song_name: Break Up In A Small Town

content:
[Intro] 
[ch]G#m7[/ch]    [ch]G#7sus2[/ch]     [ch]G#m7[/ch]     [ch]G#7sus2[/ch]
[ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]C#7sus2[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#7sus2[/ch]

[Verse 1] 
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
I don't know if you were looking at me or not[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]G#7sus2[/ch]
You probably smile like that all the time[/tab]
And I don't mean to bother you but
[tab]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I couldn't just walk by[/tab]
And not say hi
[tab]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
And I know your name[/tab]
'Cause everybody in here knows your name
[tab]                           [ch]G#7sus2[/ch]
And you're not looking for anything right now[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#7sus2[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
So I don't wanna come on strong[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
But don't get me wrong, Your eyes are so intimidating[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
My heart is pounding but[/tab]
It's just a conversation
No girl I'm not wasted
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]C#7sus2[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
You don't know me, I don't know you    but I want to[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't wanna steal your freedom[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I don't wanna change your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to make you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't wanna wreck your Friday[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I ain't gonna waste my lines[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to take your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
And I know it starts with hello[/tab]
And the next thing you know you're trying to be nice
And some guys getting too close
[tab]                   [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Trying to pick you up, Trying to get you drunk[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G#m7[/ch]
And I'm sure one of your friends is about to come over here[/tab]
'Cause she's supposed to save you from random guys
[tab]                                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]
That talk too much and wanna stay too long[/tab]
It's the same old song and dance but I think you know it well
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
You could've rolled your eyes, Told me to go to hell                                  [/tab]
Could've walked away, 
[tab]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
But you're still here, And I'm still here[/tab]
Come on let's see where it goes

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't wanna steal your freedom[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I don't wanna change your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to make you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't have to meet your mother[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
We don't have to cross that line[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't wanna steal your covers[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]

[Bridge] 
[ch]G#m[/ch]  (Hold for 8 counts) 
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Wooah - Wooaah - Woah- Oooh. [/tab]
I don't wanna go home with you
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Wooah - Wooaah - Woah- Oooh. [/tab]
I just wanna be alone with you

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't wanna steal your freedom[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I don't wanna change your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to make you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]

(Build back in) 
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't wanna blow your phone up[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I just wanna blow your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to take your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]

[Chorus 4]
[tab][ch]B[/ch] 
No, I ain't gotta call you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
And I ain't gotta call you mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I don't have to take your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna take your time[/tab]

[Outro] 
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Oooo - OOooo[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Oooo - OOooo [/tab]
[ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]B[/ch]
